meta.notes: All restrictions verified from official council PSPO pages. Cornwall PSPO valid 2026-2028. Dorset PSPO valid until Dec 2026.

restriction_types.prohibited_seasonal: Dogs banned from beach during dates/times shown
restriction_types.on_lead_seasonal: Dogs allowed but must be on lead during dates/times shown

beaches.notes: Bude. Dogs permitted but must be on lead during restricted hours. Not prohibited - just on-lead.

beaches.notes: Newquay. Blue Flag beach - longer restriction period

beaches.name: Porthcurno Beach
beaches.notes: No Cornwall PSPO restriction. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Kynance Cove
beaches.notes: National Trust. No formal PSPO. NT ask dogs kept under close control.

beaches.name: Charlestown Beach
beaches.notes: No Cornwall PSPO restriction. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Croyde Bay Beach
beaches.notes: North Devon PSPO. Full ban May-Sept, no time window - dogs not permitted at all during this period.

beaches.name: Combe Martin Beach
beaches.notes: North Devon PSPO. Full ban May-Sept.

beaches.name: Woolacombe Beach
beaches.notes: North Devon. Dogs permitted outside 10am-6pm. Large beach with unrestricted sections at north end.

beaches.name: Westward Ho! Beach
beaches.notes: North Devon PSPO.

beaches.name: Saunton Sands
beaches.notes: North Devon. Very long beach - dog-friendly sections at southern end year-round.

beaches.name: Paignton Sands
beaches.notes: Torbay PSPO.

beaches.name: Torre Abbey Sands
beaches.notes: Torquay. Torbay PSPO.

beaches.name: Oddicombe Beach
beaches.notes: Torquay. Torbay PSPO.

beaches.name: Babbacombe Beach
beaches.notes: Torbay. Dogs welcome all year - listed as unrestricted in Torbay PSPO.

beaches.name: Bigbury-on-Sea Main Beach
beaches.notes: Main beach between car park and Burgh Island. Dogs banned 1st May to 30th Sept, 10am to 7pm. South Hams PSPO.

beaches.name: Bigbury-on-Sea West Beach
beaches.notes: Smaller beach west of the causeway. Dogs welcome all year round.

beaches.name: Goodrington Sands North
beaches.notes: Torbay. North sands unrestricted. South section banned May-Sept.

beaches.name: Sidmouth Beach
beaches.notes: East Devon PSPO.

beaches.name: Budleigh Salterton Beach
beaches.notes: East Devon PSPO.

beaches.name: Exmouth Beach
beaches.notes: East Devon PSPO. Central beach section. Dog-friendly sections at eastern end.

beaches.name: Durdle Door Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No Dorset PSPO restriction.

beaches.name: Lulworth Cove
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No Dorset PSPO restriction.

beaches.name: West Bay Beach
beaches.notes: East/West harbour sides restricted. Third beach beyond rock groyne unrestricted all year.

beaches.name: Charmouth Beach East
beaches.notes: East beach no restrictions all year. West beach restricted Oct-Apr only.

beaches.name: Burton Bradstock Beach
beaches.notes: National Trust. No formal PSPO but NT request dogs not exercised freely May-Sept.

beaches.name: Lyme Regis Front Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs allowed Oct-Apr on lead only.

beaches.name: Monmouth Beach
beaches.notes: Lyme Regis area. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Cogden Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Studland Beach
beaches.notes: National Trust. Shell, South, Middle beaches require on-lead May-Sept. Knoll beach unrestricted. Check NT signage.

beaches.name: Church Cliff Beach
beaches.notes: Lyme Regis area. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Burnham-on-Sea Beach (Area 1 — Jetty to Pavilion)
beaches.notes: Year-round ban. Beach, jetty and esplanade steps between the jetty and pavilion.

beaches.name: Burnham-on-Sea Beach (Area 2 — Jetty to Yacht Club)
beaches.notes: Banned May-Sept. Dogs permitted Oct-Apr.

beaches.name: Burnham-on-Sea Beach (Area 3 — Pavilion to Maddocks Slade)
beaches.notes: Banned May-Sept. Dogs permitted Oct-Apr.

beaches.name: Berrow Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs allowed all year. Must be under control or on a lead.

beaches.name: Brean Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs allowed all year. Must be under control or on a lead.

beaches.name: Minehead Beach
beaches.notes: Section from Golf Club Groyne to Jubilee Cafe banned May-Sept. Section between cafe and harbour area remains accessible.

beaches.name: Tenby North Beach
beaches.notes: TOTAL dog ban May-Sept. One of only two total bans in Pembrokeshire.

beaches.name: Whitesands Beach
beaches.notes: TOTAL dog ban May-Sept. St Davids. One of only two total bans in Pembrokeshire.

beaches.name: Saundersfoot Beach
beaches.notes: Partial ban — specific areas restricted. Dog exercise areas remain. Check beach signage.

beaches.name: Tenby Castle and South Beach
beaches.notes: Partial ban May-Sept. Dog-friendly areas remain at edges.

beaches.name: Amroth Beach
beaches.notes: Partial ban on beach and promenade May-Sept.

beaches.name: Poppit Sands
beaches.notes: Partial ban May-Sept. Dog exercise areas remain.

beaches.name: Broad Haven North Beach
beaches.notes: Partial ban May-Sept. Northern third restricted.

beaches.name: Newgale Beach
beaches.notes: Partial ban on beach and pebble bank May-Sept.

beaches.name: Dale Beach
beaches.notes: Partial ban May-Sept.

beaches.name: Lydstep Beach
beaches.notes: Partial ban May-Sept.

beaches.name: Barafundle Bay
beaches.notes: National Trust. No ban — dogs welcome all year. No road access, walk-in only.

beaches.name: Freshwater West
beaches.notes: No PSPO restriction. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Scarborough South Bay Beach
beaches.notes: North Yorkshire PSPO. Main beach section banned. Dog-friendly sections exist at edges.

beaches.name: Scarborough North Bay Beach
beaches.notes: North Yorkshire PSPO. Main beach section banned May-Sept.

beaches.name: Whitby West Cliff Beach
beaches.notes: North Yorkshire PSPO. West Cliff beach banned May-Sept.

beaches.name: Whitby Tate Hill Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs permitted all year but must be kept on lead May-Sept. Separate from West Cliff ban.

beaches.name: Filey Beach
beaches.notes: North Yorkshire PSPO. Main beach section banned May-Sept.

beaches.name: Sandsend Beach
beaches.notes: North Yorkshire PSPO. Banned May-Sept.

beaches.name: Bridlington North Beach
beaches.notes: East Riding PSPO. Between north end of North Marine Promenade and north-east face of North Pier.

beaches.name: Bridlington South Beach
beaches.notes: East Riding PSPO. Between south face of South Pier and east face of Princess Mary Promenade.

beaches.name: Hornsea Beach
beaches.notes: East Riding PSPO. Between concrete ramp at Headland View and steps south of Sands Lane.

beaches.name: Withernsea Beach
beaches.notes: East Riding PSPO. Between first groyne north of access ramp and beach steps at Pier Tower.

beaches.name: Robin Hood's Bay Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No PSPO restriction.

beaches.name: Runswick Bay Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No PSPO restriction.

beaches.name: Cayton Bay Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No PSPO restriction.

beaches.name: Bamburgh Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No restrictions. Iconic beach with castle backdrop.

beaches.name: Embleton Bay
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. National Trust. Dunstanburgh Castle ruins nearby.

beaches.name: Alnmouth Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No restrictions.

beaches.name: Beadnell Bay
beaches.notes: Dogs on lead near dunes Apr-Aug due to nesting shorebirds. Sandy beach itself unrestricted.

beaches.name: Seahouses Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No restrictions.

beaches.name: Druridge Bay
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. 7-mile stretch with no restrictions.

beaches.name: Warkworth Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No restrictions.

beaches.name: Holy Island (Lindisfarne)
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Check tide times — causeway closes at high tide. Nature reserve: dogs on lead in designated areas.

beaches.name: Southwold Main Beach
beaches.notes: Banned Apr-Sept (starts April not May — longer than most). Full promenade stretch.

beaches.name: Southwold Denes Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Just north of main beach off Ferry Road.

beaches.name: Aldeburgh Beach (Main)
beaches.notes: Main beach section banned May-Sept. Dog-friendly shingle north of town (Wentworth to Thorpeness) unrestricted all year.

beaches.name: Aldeburgh North Beach (Wentworth to Thorpeness)
beaches.notes: Mile of dog-friendly shingle north of town. No restrictions all year.

beaches.name: Felixstowe Main Beach
beaches.notes: Spa Pavilion to Buregate Road banned May-Sept. Unrestricted sections either side all year.

beaches.name: Lowestoft Main Beach
beaches.notes: CEFAS building to South Pier banned May-Sept. Pakefield and Kessingland nearby unrestricted.

beaches.name: Kessingland Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No restrictions.

beaches.name: Sizewell Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No restrictions. Shingle beach.

beaches.name: Cromer Beach
beaches.notes: North Norfolk PSPO. Main beach section restricted May-Sept.

beaches.name: Sea Palling Beach
beaches.notes: North Norfolk PSPO NNDC006. Dog exclusion May-Sept including beach access routes.

beaches.name: East Runton Beach
beaches.notes: North Norfolk PSPO 2025. Dog exclusion May-Sept.

beaches.name: Hunstanton South Beach
beaches.notes: Upper beach nesting birds Apr-Aug. Dogs on lead and avoid cordoned areas. Not a full ban.

beaches.name: Hunstanton North Beach (Old Hunstanton)
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No restrictions.

beaches.name: Holkham Beach
beaches.notes: National Trust/Holkham Estate. Dogs welcome all year. Keep to paths through dunes. One of England's finest beaches.

beaches.name: Wells-next-the-Sea Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. No restrictions on main beach.

beaches.name: Viking Bay
beaches.notes: Broadstairs. Thanet PSPO. Dogs banned all day May-Sept.

beaches.name: Margate Main Sands
beaches.notes: Thanet PSPO. Dogs banned all day May-Sept.

beaches.name: Botany Bay
beaches.notes: Broadstairs. Thanet PSPO. Dogs allowed before 10am and after 10pm Apr-Sept, unrestricted Oct-Mar.

beaches.name: Dumpton Gap
beaches.notes: Between Broadstairs and Ramsgate. Dogs welcome all year, off lead.

beaches.name: Minnis Bay
beaches.notes: Birchington. Thanet PSPO. Dogs banned all day May-Sept.

beaches.name: Walpole Bay
beaches.notes: Cliftonville. Thanet PSPO. Dogs on lead only between 10am-6pm May-Sept.

beaches.name: Kingsgate Bay
beaches.notes: Broadstairs. Dogs welcome all year round. Quiet cove accessed by steps.

beaches.name: Herne Bay Central Beach
beaches.notes: From Pier west to Lane End. Dogs banned May-Sept. Unrestricted section east of pier all year.

beaches.name: Herne Bay East Beach
beaches.notes: East of pier. Dogs welcome all year round.

beaches.name: Tankerton Beach
beaches.notes: Whitstable. Dogs banned on beach May-Sept. Must be on lead on promenade during same period.

beaches.name: Joss Bay
beaches.notes: Broadstairs. Thanet PSPO. Dogs banned May-Sept. Unrestricted Oct-Apr.

beaches.name: Sunny Sands
beaches.notes: Folkestone. Folkestone & Hythe PSPO. Dogs banned May-Sept.

beaches.name: Hythe Beach
beaches.notes: Folkestone & Hythe PSPO. Dogs banned May-Sept from Twiss Road to St Leonard's Road.

beaches.name: Dymchurch Beach
beaches.notes: Folkestone & Hythe PSPO. Dogs banned May-Sept from Sycamore Gardens to Martello Car Park.

beaches.name: Pegwell Bay
beaches.notes: Mudflats and saltmarsh protected wildlife area. Year-round ban to protect nesting birds.

beaches.name: Walmer Beach
beaches.notes: Dover District PSPO. Dogs welcome all year outside any signed exclusion zones.

beaches.name: Brighton Beach (Central)
beaches.notes: Brighton & Hove PSPO. No dogs on central beach May-Sept (below Montepelier Road to Sealife Centre). Dogs allowed Oct-Apr.

beaches.name: Hove Beach
beaches.notes: Brighton & Hove PSPO. Restricted sections: Berriedale Ave to Sackville Gardens, and Hove Street to First Avenue. Dogs free Oct-Apr.

beaches.name: Eastbourne Beach (Main)
beaches.notes: East Sussex PSPO. Dogs banned Wish Tower to Pier May-Sept. Welcome Oct-Apr.

beaches.name: Eastbourne Western Parade Beach
beaches.notes: West of Wish Tower. Dogs welcome all year.

beaches.name: Hastings Beach (Harbour Arm to Pier)
beaches.notes: Hastings PSPO 2025. Dogs banned west of Harbour Arm to east side of Pier, Apr-Sept. Dogs must be on lead on promenade all year.

beaches.name: Hastings Beach (Bottle Alley to Royal Victoria)
beaches.notes: Hastings PSPO 2025. Dogs banned west end of Bottle Alley to opposite Royal Victoria Hotel, Apr-Sept.

beaches.name: Rock-a-Nore Beach
beaches.notes: Restrictions removed Nov 2024 following public consultation. Dogs now welcome all year.

beaches.name: Seaford Beach
beaches.notes: Seaford PSPO. Dogs banned Edinburgh Road to West View May-Sept.

beaches.name: Bexhill Beach
beaches.notes: Rother PSPO. Dogs banned Brockley Road to Sea Road May-Sept.

beaches.name: Winchelsea Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. Shingle beach near Camber.

beaches.name: Worthing Beach (Central)
beaches.notes: Adur & Worthing PSPO. Dogs banned Heene Road to Splash Point May-Sept.

beaches.name: Goring Beach
beaches.notes: Adur & Worthing PSPO. Dogs banned between two boat launch ramps May-Sept.

beaches.name: Bognor Regis Beach
beaches.notes: Arun District PSPO valid to 2026. Dogs banned Bognor Sailing Club ramp to Gloucester Road May-Sept.

beaches.name: Felpham Beach
beaches.notes: Arun District PSPO. Dogs banned Canning Road to Felpham Sailing Club May-Sept.

beaches.name: Littlehampton Beach
beaches.notes: Arun District PSPO. Dogs banned East Pier to Norfolk Road May-Sept. Dogs on lead on promenade.

beaches.name: West Wittering Beach
beaches.notes: West Wittering Estate. Dogs excluded between groynes 14a to 18 May to mid-Sept. Welcome everywhere else all year.

beaches.name: Frinton-on-Sea Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned from Warden Station below Connaught Ave to public conveniences below Cambridge Road. May-Sept.

beaches.name: Clacton-on-Sea Beach
beaches.notes: Tendring PSPO. Central section banned May-Sept. Unrestricted sections north and south of town.

beaches.name: Walton-on-the-Naze Beach
beaches.notes: Tendring PSPO. Main beach section banned May-Sept.

beaches.name: Dovercourt Bay Beach
beaches.notes: Dogs banned Mill Lane subway to end of promenade at Spa Cabins, and from slipway SW of swimming pool. May-Sept.

beaches.name: Thorpe Bay Beach
beaches.notes: Southend PSPO. Dogs banned May-Sept.

beaches.name: Shoebury Common Beach
beaches.notes: Southend PSPO. Dogs banned May-Sept. Quieter alternative to central Southend.

beaches.name: West Mersea Beach
beaches.notes: Mersea Island. Dogs welcome all year. Sandy and shingle beach with beach huts.

beaches.name: Woolacombe Beach (Zone A)
beaches.notes: North Devon PSPO. Main beach zone — no dogs Apr 1 to Nov 1. Zone C (south end) unrestricted all year.

beaches.name: Woolacombe Beach (Zone B)
beaches.notes: North Devon PSPO. Dogs on lead only May-Sept in Zone B. Unrestricted Oct-Apr.

beaches.name: Croyde Beach
beaches.notes: North Devon PSPO. Dogs banned May-Sept. Dogs on lead in dunes May-Sept. Welcome Oct-Apr.

beaches.name: Saunton Sands
beaches.notes: No formal restrictions. Dogs welcome all year. On lead requested near beach hut area at start of beach.

beaches.name: Putsborough Sands
beaches.notes: North Devon PSPO. Dogs banned far left section Easter to Nov 1. Remainder of beach unrestricted all year.

beaches.name: Instow Beach
beaches.notes: North Devon PSPO. Dogs banned Quay to Lane End Road May-Sept. Rest of beach unrestricted.

beaches.name: Westward Ho! Beach
beaches.notes: Torridge PSPO. Dogs banned from Blue Flag area May-Sept. On lead on promenade May-Sept.

beaches.name: Exmouth Beach
beaches.notes: East Devon PSPO (reviewed Apr 2026). Dogs banned from main beach sections May-Sept. Check local signage for exact zones.

beaches.name: Barricane Beach
beaches.notes: North Devon PSPO. Adjacent to Woolacombe. Dogs on lead May-Sept. Welcome off lead Oct-Apr.

beaches.name: Blackpool Central Beach
beaches.notes: Blackpool PSPO. Central section between lifeboat station and pier banned Good Friday to 30 Sept. North and south sections unrestricted.

beaches.name: Blackpool North Shore
beaches.notes: Dogs welcome all year. North of the restricted central section.

beaches.name: St Annes Beach (Central)
beaches.notes: Fylde PSPO. Central section between lifeboat station and pier. Good Friday to 30 Sept.

beaches.name: St Annes North Beach
beaches.notes: North of lifeboat station. Dogs welcome all year, popular kite-flying beach.

beaches.name: Cleveleys Beach
beaches.notes: Wyre PSPO (since 2012). Dogs banned from bathing area between FBKafe and Wyre/Blackpool boundary May-Sept.

beaches.name: Fleetwood Marine Beach
beaches.notes: Wyre PSPO. Dogs banned opposite beach huts near slipway and Central car park May-Sept.

beaches.name: Morecambe North Beach
beaches.notes: Lancaster City Council PSPO 2024 (valid 3 years). Dogs banned May-Sept. Welcome Oct-Apr.

beaches.name: Morecambe South Beach
beaches.notes: Lancaster City Council PSPO 2024 (valid 3 years). Dogs banned May-Sept. Welcome Oct-Apr.
